title: cyperus micrantherus
intro: Cyperus micrantherus, also known as small-flowered flat sedge, is a type of sedge plant in the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyperus micrantherus include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Cyperus micrantherus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional herbal medicine.
